title: triticum vulgare var. subtricoccum
intro: Triticum vulgare var. subtricoccum, also known as wild einkorn, is a type of ancient grain that belongs to the wheat family (Poaceae). It has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of consuming Triticum vulgare var. subtricoccum include improved gut health, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. This plant can be prepared as an herbal supplement or used in traditional medicine to make teas, infusions, and other herbal preparations.
